title: Hydrogel-Mediated delivery of Annexin A1 peptide modulates inflammation and tissue remodelling in ligature-induced murine periodontitis.
snippet: Periodontitis is characterized by chronic inflammation and progressive alveolar bone loss. This study evaluated whether local delivery of an Annexin A1 N-terminal mimetic peptide (Ac) incorporated into an anionic carboxymethylcellulose hydrogel (Hydrogel/AnxA1) modulates inflammation and tissue remodelling in ligature-induced periodontitis in wild-type (WT)...
